purpose: Source-documented calculation rules for all numbers generated in the Cosmic Reading report. Every calculation that appears in client-facing output must have a record here with validation_status=APPROVED and allowed_for_generation=YES.

rules.source_author_or_origin: Attributed to Pythagoras; documented in modern numerology tradition
rules.source_url_or_reference: Decoz, H. (1994). Numerology: Key to Your Inner Self. Avery Publishing Group. | Goodwin, M.O. (1981). Numerology: The Complete Guide, Vol. 1. Newcastle Publishing.
rules.formula_description: Sum all individual digits of the full birth date (DDMMYYYY or YYYYMMDD). Reduce by repeated digit-sum until reaching 1–9, 11, 22, or 33.
calculation_steps: Convert birth date to YYYYMMDD string
If result > 9 AND not in {11, 22, 33}: sum the digits of the result again
rules.master_number_rule: PRESERVE — do not reduce 11, 22, or 33 further
rules.language_rule: Not language-dependent — uses date digits only
rules.reduction_rule: Reduce by digit-sum repeatedly until 1–9 or master number
rules.client_visible_explanation: Your Life Path is calculated from the full sum of all digits in your date of birth, showing the core theme of your life journey.
rules.client_visible_explanation_ru: Число жизненного пути рассчитывается из суммы всех цифр твоей даты рождения и отражает главную тему твоего жизненного пути.
rules.internal_note: Method 1 (sum all digits together) used, not Method 2 (reduce day/month/year separately). Both give same result in most cases. Edge cases where they differ should be flagged.

rules.source_author_or_origin: Pythagorean tradition; also called Heart's Desire Number
rules.source_url_or_reference: Decoz, H. (1994). Numerology: Key to Your Inner Self. | Goodwin, M.O. (1981). Numerology: The Complete Guide.
rules.formula_description: Sum the Pythagorean numeric values of all VOWEL letters in the full birth name. Reduce by digit-sum to single digit or master number.
calculation_steps: Identify vowels using language-specific vowel set
Map each vowel to its Pythagorean value (1–9)
rules.language_rule: Vowel definitions are language-specific — see alphabet_rule

alphabet_rule.en: Vowels: A, E, I, O, U. Y treated as consonant (standard Pythagorean). NEEDS_REVIEW for Y-as-vowel edge cases.
alphabet_rule.ru: Vowels: А, Е, Ё, И, О, У, Ы, Э, Ю, Я. Й EXCLUDED (semivowel — treated as consonant). Ъ and Ь EXCLUDED (silent signs).
alphabet_rule.et: Vowels: A, E, I, O, U, Ä, Ö, Ü, Õ. Y treated as consonant. NEEDS_REVIEW.
alphabet_rule.fi: Vowels: A, E, I, O, U, Ä, Ö, Y. Y is a full vowel in Finnish. NEEDS_REVIEW.
alphabet_rule.lv: Vowels: A, Ā, E, Ē, I, Ī, O, U, Ū. Long vowels same value as short. NEEDS_REVIEW.
alphabet_rule.lt: Vowels: A, Ą, E, Ę, Ė, I, Į, O, U, Ų, Ū, Y. NEEDS_REVIEW.

rules.reduction_rule: Reduce by digit-sum repeatedly until 1–9 or master number
rules.client_visible_explanation: Soul Urge is calculated from the vowels in your name — reflecting inner motivation and what deeply matters to you.
rules.client_visible_explanation_ru: Число душевного порыва рассчитывается из гласных букв твоего имени и отражает глубинные мотивации и то, что важно для твоей души.
rules.internal_note: Й was incorrectly included in VOWELS in v2.6 code. Corrected in v2.7 (numerology.js). For Russian names containing Й, this correction changes Soul Urge value. Existing reports using v2.6 logic may have different values.

rules.source_author_or_origin: Pythagorean tradition; also called Destiny Number
rules.formula_description: Sum the Pythagorean numeric values of ALL letters in the full birth name. Reduce to single digit or master number.
calculation_steps: Map EVERY letter to its Pythagorean value

alphabet_rule.note_ru: Ё treated as distinct letter with value 7 (continuation of cycle from Е=6). Alternative: Ё=6. NEEDS_REVIEW for final standardisation.
alphabet_rule.et_fi_lv_lt: Special characters mapped to base letter value: Ä→1, Ö→6, Ü→3, Õ→6, Š→1, Ž→8, Ā→1, Ē→5, Ī→9, Ū→3, Č→3, Ą→1, Ę→5, Ė→5, Į→9, Ų→3. NEEDS_REVIEW.

rules.reduction_rule: Reduce by digit-sum repeatedly until 1–9 or master number
rules.client_visible_explanation: Expression is calculated from all letters of your name — reflecting natural talents and what you project to the world.
rules.client_visible_explanation_ru: Число выражения рассчитывается из всех букв имени и отражает природные таланты и то, что ты проявляешь в мире.

rules.formula_description: Sum the Pythagorean numeric values of all CONSONANT letters in the full birth name. Reduce to single digit or master number.
calculation_steps: Identify consonants (all letters not in the language-specific vowel set)
Map each consonant to its Pythagorean value
rules.language_rule: Consonants defined as: all letters NOT in the language-specific vowel set
rules.alphabet_rule: See CALC-002 for vowel definitions per language. Consonants = all other letters.
rules.reduction_rule: Reduce by digit-sum repeatedly until 1–9 or master number
rules.client_visible_explanation: Personality is calculated from the consonants in your name — reflecting the impression you make and how others perceive you.
rules.client_visible_explanation_ru: Число личности рассчитывается из согласных букв имени и отражает впечатление, которое ты производишь на других.
rules.internal_note: Mathematical relationship: Personality = Expression - Soul Urge (before final reduction, or after, depending on the path). Direct calculation from consonants used.

rules.source_url_or_reference: Decoz, H. (1994). Numerology: Key to Your Inner Self.
rules.formula_description: Reduce birth day to single digit + reduce birth month to single digit + reduce target year digit-sum to single digit. Sum the three, then reduce to 1–9 (master numbers NOT preserved for Personal Year).
calculation_steps: Take birth day (DD): if two digits, sum them (18→9)
Take birth month (MM): if two digits, sum them (12→3)
Reduce result to 1–9 (Personal Year does not preserve master numbers in this system)
rules.master_number_rule: NOT PRESERVED for Personal Year — reduces to 1–9
rules.client_visible_explanation: Your Personal Year is calculated by combining your birth day, birth month, and the digits of the current year — showing the main theme of this annual cycle.
rules.client_visible_explanation_ru: Личный год рассчитывается из числа дня рождения, месяца и суммы цифр текущего года и отражает главную тему этого годового цикла.
rules.internal_note: Previous code (v2.6) used unreduced day (18 instead of 9) + unreduced year digit sum, giving 11 for Катя instead of 2. Corrected in v2.7. This is a breaking change for existing users — report calculations section shows new correct values.

rules.source_url_or_reference: Ptolemy, Claudius. Tetrabiblos (2nd century CE). | Standard contemporary astrological date tables.
rules.formula_description: Determine Sun Sign from birth month and day using standard tropical zodiac date ranges. Cusp dates (±1 day) are approximate — exact timing requires ephemeris.
calculation_steps: Extract month and day from birth date
Compare to standard zodiac date ranges
rules.language_rule: Sign name translated per language in output
rules.client_visible_explanation: Sun Sign determined from birth date using standard Western astrology date ranges.
rules.client_visible_explanation_ru: Знак Солнца определяется из даты рождения по стандартным таблицам западной астрологии.
rules.internal_note: Cusp dates may shift ±1 day depending on the year. For precision, ephemeris lookup is needed. Current implementation uses fixed dates — flagged as acceptable for symbolic use.

rules.source_url_or_reference: Traditional Chinese lunisolar calendar. Chinese New Year dates from historical astronomical records.
rules.formula_description: Determine the Eastern animal symbol from birth year, adjusting for Chinese New Year date. People born before Chinese New Year belong to the previous year's animal cycle.
calculation_steps: Look up Chinese New Year date for birth year
If born BEFORE Chinese New Year of birth year: use previous year
Calculate: ((effective_year - 1900) mod 12) to get animal index (0=Rat, 1=Ox, ...8=Monkey, 9=Rooster, 10=Dog, 11=Pig)
rules.example_calculation: CNY 1981 = Feb 5. Born Jan 18 < Feb 5 → effective year = 1980. (1980-1900) mod 12 = 80 mod 12 = 8 → Monkey
rules.client_visible_explanation: Eastern birth year symbol determined from the traditional 12-year animal cycle, adjusted for Chinese New Year date. Used as a symbolic self-reflection layer only.
rules.client_visible_explanation_ru: Символ восточного года рождения определяется по традиционному 12-летнему циклу с учётом даты китайского нового года. Используется только как символический слой для саморефлексии.
rules.internal_note: CNY dates table covers 1960–2005. For births outside this range, a simplified year-based calculation is used (no CNY adjustment). Mark such cases as approximate.

rules.source_name: Contemporary symbolic numerology — Major Arcana mapping
rules.source_author_or_origin: Contemporary synthesis of numerology and Tarot archetypes; various authors
rules.source_url_or_reference: Various contemporary sources — not attributable to a single authoritative source. NEEDS_REVIEW.
rules.formula_description: Map numerological numbers 1–22 to the 22 Major Arcana of the Tarot as symbolic reference images. Used as reflective metaphor only, not as predictive system.
calculation_steps: Take the numerological number (Life Path, Soul Urge, etc.)
If number is in range 1–22: map to corresponding Major Arcana
If number > 22: skip (no direct mapping in standard 22-card system)
rules.master_number_rule: 11 maps to Major Arcana XI, 22 maps to Major Arcana XXII
rules.language_rule: Archetype descriptions drawn from KB in target language
rules.client_visible_explanation: Symbolic archetypes are used as reflective imagery — they are not a scientific personality system but a symbolic language for self-exploration.
rules.client_visible_explanation_ru: Символические архетипы используются как образный язык для саморефлексии — это не научная система оценки личности, а символический зеркало для самопознания.
rules.internal_note: Source traceability is WEAK. The specific interpretation content comes from the KB which has its own authorship. The mapping system itself (1–22 to Major Arcana) is widely used in contemporary numerology but not from a single cited source.

language_alphabet_rules.note: Baltic and Finnish alphabet rules for Pythagorean numerology are not standardised in academic literature. Current implementation uses base-letter-value mapping for special characters. Human review by a numerology practitioner familiar with these languages is recommended before marking as APPROVED.

preferred_wording.use: your path / your journey / what you're building
this may suggest / this can be interpreted as
you may often / you tend to / there can be a tendency
symbolic layer / archetypal image / reflective metaphor
pattern / tendency / possible way of responding
may suggest themes of / invites reflection on
